title: Refine the search bar
excerpt:
Refine the search bar. Perhaps use the quote function to search for specific phrases. Or also an option to select a specific column for the search to be performed. 
Refinar a barra de busca. Talvez usar a função das aspa…

posts.author: maira (Maíra Santiago)
posts.cookedHtml:
Refine the search bar. Perhaps use the quote function to search for specific phrases. Or also an option to select a specific column for the search to be performed.

Refinar a barra de busca. Talvez usar a função das aspas para buscar frases específicas. Ou também uma opção para selecionar uma coluna específica para a busca ser feita.

posts.author: Paolo (Paolo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

in my opinion the Search Everything feature lacks of a robust filtering feature with different conditions at the same time, the same ones that we have in boards.

Do you have any plan to add that? Or do you have any workaround to solve it?

Best
